title: limonium ovalifolium subsp. biflorum
intro: Limonium ovalifolium subsp. biflorum, also known as sea lavender or sea pyrethrum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Limonium ovalifolium subsp. biflorum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
